understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate a grid, use modifier tiles to adjust the shape, color, and rotation of a carried piece, match the requirements of goal cells, and step onto them to complete all goals in each level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn, players can move in four directions unless blocked by walls. Modifier tiles cycle through shapes, colors, or rotate the piece. Goals require a specific combination of shape, color, and rotation. Stepping onto an active goal completes it. Moving costs stamina; reaching zero loses a life. Losing all lives ends the game.
